section: Particle animations powered by @chenglou/pretext (created with the help of AI ❤️)

demos.title: Word Cloud
demos.desc: Words of varying sizes float as particles. pretext measures each word's exact pixel width per font size.

demos.title: Paragraph Around Obstacles
demos.desc: A paragraph reflows around moving obstacles in real time using variable maxWidth per line.

demos.title: Typewriter Stream
demos.desc: Phrases stream in as fitted badges. pretext computes exact dimensions without touching the DOM.

demos.title: Multi-language & Emoji
demos.desc: Side-by-side: pretext word segments vs naive Array.from(). Multi-codepoint emoji stay intact on the left.

demos.title: Balanced Labels
demos.desc: Label cards wrapped to their tightest balanced width via binary search — text-wrap: balance without CSS.
